nasb.text: Anyone who goes too far and does not abide in the teaching of Christ, does not have God; the one who abides in the teaching, he has both the Father and the Son.

esv.text: Everyone who goes on ahead and does not abide in the teaching of Christ, does not have God. Whoever abides in the teaching has both the Father and the Son.

cnv.text: 凡越過基督的教訓又不持守的，就沒有　神；持守這教訓的，就有父和子了。

ccb.text: 谁偏离基督的教导，谁心中就没有上帝；谁遵守基督的教导，谁就有父和子与他同在。

csbs.text: 凡是越过基督的教导，不住在这教导中的，就没有神；那住在这教导中的，他才有了父，也有了子。
